name: Blazeio Framework
description: A high-performance, asynchronous Python web framework optimized for extreme hardware efficiency, delivering 10,000+ RPS on low-cost VPS instances.

funding_goals.purpose: Core infrastructure benchmarking, optimization of async networking modules, and open-source documentation expansion.

production_proof.production_metrics: Handles 10K+ RPS average across 200+ microservice endpoints

contact.notes: Maintained by a privacy-first core engineering team. Communications are strictly text-based and asynchronous.
